description: Search academic and technical literature through bounded arXiv/OpenAlex/Unpaywall runtime callables.
whenToUse: Invoke when Hermes needs bounded academic or technical literature search/metadata from OpenAlex/arXiv/Unpaywall for research, source evaluation, or DK capability-candidate analysis.
failureModes: The selected literature tool is unknown or unsupported.
The public literature provider is unreachable, rate-limited, or returns degraded data.
Required query/identifier fields are missing or invalid.
Download-oriented tools may fail when no open-access source is available.
The returned payload fails output schema validation.
